seo.title: 4 Weeks of THE PREP Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Gain muscle and torch fat with 4 Weeks of THE PREP. See what the program includes, any equipment needed and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Amoila is an NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape—and his live strength, HIIT, and core workouts can do the same for you. In addition to his classes on BODi, Amoila is the creator of 645™, 6 Weeks of THE WORK®, and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™, available on Beachbody On Demand.

data.descriptionShort: Prepare for 6 Weeks of THE WORK or any advanced Beachbody program.
data.descriptionLong: Challenge yourself with 4 Weeks of THE PREP, a series of functional training workouts designed to help get your body and mind ready for 6 Weeks of THE WORK or any advanced BODi program.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells, Resistance Loops, Strength Slides, Chin-Up Bar*, Chin-Up Max*, Core Comfort Mat*
modules.categories: Strength, Cardio, Athletic Training, Recovery, Mobility & Flexibility

media.title: 4 Weeks of THE PREP Sample Workout
media.subtitle: 30m

modules.title: Is 4 Weeks of THE PREP Right for Me?
modules.content: Want to do THE WORK? Start with THE PREP. Challenge yourself with a series of functional training workouts designed to help get your body and mind ready for 6 Weeks of THE WORK or any advanced BODi program.

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: Amoila will take you through 11 unique workouts which repeat over the course of 4 weeks. For 5 days a week, you'll do a 30 to 40-minute workout designed to help you gain muscle and torch fat— all while preparing you to take on Amoila's more advanced training. While these workouts include modifications for every move and are not as intense as the ones in 6 Weeks of THE WORK, you'll still have to give Amoila your all every single day.

modules.title: Tools & Equipment
modules.content: You’ll get the 4 Weeks of THE PREP Get Started Guide, Workout Calendar, and the BODi Guide to Nutrition. Essential equipment includes light, medium and heavy dumbbells, BODi Resistance Loops, Strength Slides (and booties). A Chin-Up Bar, Chin-Up Max and mat are all optional.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Amoila Cesar is a NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape. Along with CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER, he’s also the creator of 645®, 6 Weeks of THE WORK® and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™. He’s led millions worldwide, from professional athletes, A-list celebrities, and CEOs to mothers, entrepreneurs, and more through their fitness journey.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.
